mapper.select: /** UsptTaskTaxitmWctHistDao.selectMaxHistList */ select c.task_taxitm_wct_hist_id /*과제세목별사업비ID */ , c.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ , a.wct_ioe_id /*사업비비목ID*/ , a.wct_ioe_nm /*사업비비목명*/ , b.wct_taxitm_id /*사업비세목ID*/ , b.wct_taxitm_nm /*사업비세목명*/ , c.comput_basis_cn /*산출근거내용*/ , coalesce(c.sport_budget,0) as sport_budget /*지원예산*/ , coalesce(c.alotm_cash,0) as alotm_cash /*부담금현금*/ , coalesce(c.alotm_acthng,0) as alotm_acthng /*부담금현물*/ , coalesce(c.sport_budget + c.alotm_cash + c.alotm_acthng,0) as alotm_sum_tot /*합계*/ , c.confm_task_taxitm_wct_hist_id from uspt_wct_ioe a /*사업비 비목*/ inner join uspt_wct_taxitm b /*사업비 세목*/ on a.wct_ioe_id = b.wct_ioe_id and a.wct_ioe_id in ('ioe-e2630404b87647cfa1d0ed350554eb01','ioe-e2630404b87647cfa1d0ed350554eb02') /*인건비, 운영비*/ inner join uspt_task_taxitm_wct_hist c /*과제세목별사업비*/ on b.wct_taxitm_id = c.wct_taxitm_id and cnvn_change_req_id= #{cnvnChangeReqId} and c.created_dt = ( select max(created_dt) from uspt_task_taxitm_wct_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and (confm_task_taxitm_wct_hist_id is null or confm_task_taxitm_wct_hist_id = ''))

/** UsptTaskTaxitmWctHistDao.selectUsptTaskTaxitmWctHistChangeDe */ select cnvn_change_req_id , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmdd') as change_de , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') as change_dt from uspt_task_taxitm_wct_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and (confm_task_taxitm_wct_hist_id is null or confm_task_taxitm_wct_hist_id = '') group by cnvn_change_req_id, created_dt order by created_dt desc

/** UsptTaskTaxitmWctHistDao.selectUsptTaskTaxitmWctHistByDt */ select 'before' as change_be_af , c.task_taxitm_wct_hist_id /*과제세목별사업비ID */ , c.cnvn_change_req_id , c.confm_task_taxitm_wct_hist_id , c.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ , a.wct_ioe_id /*사업비비목ID*/ , a.wct_ioe_nm /*사업비비목명*/ , b.wct_taxitm_id /*사업비세목ID*/ , b.wct_taxitm_nm /*사업비세목명*/ , c.comput_basis_cn /*산출근거내용*/ , coalesce(c.sport_budget,0) as sport_budget /*지원예산*/ , coalesce(c.alotm_cash,0) as alotm_cash /*부담금현금*/ , coalesce(c.alotm_acthng,0) as alotm_acthng /*부담금현물*/ , coalesce(c.sport_budget + c.alotm_cash + c.alotm_acthng,0) as alotm_sum_tot /*합계*/ ,to_char(c.created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_wct_ioe a /*사업비 비목*/ inner join uspt_wct_taxitm b /*사업비 세목*/ on a.wct_ioe_id = b.wct_ioe_id and a.wct_ioe_id in ('ioe-e2630404b87647cfa1d0ed350554eb01','ioe-e2630404b87647cfa1d0ed350554eb02') /*인건비, 운영비*/ inner join uspt_task_taxitm_wct_hist c /*과제세목별사업비*/ on b.wct_taxitm_id = c.wct_taxitm_id and c.cnvn_change_req_id= #{cnvnChangeReqId} and c.confm_task_taxitm_wct_hist_id is not null and c.confm_task_taxitm_wct_hist_id !='' union all select 'after' as change_be_af , c.task_taxitm_wct_hist_id /*과제세목별사업비ID */ , c.confm_task_taxitm_wct_hist_id , c.cnvn_change_req_id , c.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ , a.wct_ioe_id /*사업비비목ID*/ , a.wct_ioe_nm /*사업비비목명*/ , b.wct_taxitm_id /*사업비세목ID*/ , b.wct_taxitm_nm /*사업비세목명*/ , c.comput_basis_cn /*산출근거내용*/ , coalesce(c.sport_budget,0) as sport_budget /*지원예산*/ , coalesce(c.alotm_cash,0) as alotm_cash /*부담금현금*/ , coalesce(c.alotm_acthng,0) as alotm_acthng /*부담금현물*/ , coalesce(c.sport_budget + c.alotm_cash + c.alotm_acthng,0) as alotm_sum_tot /*합계*/ ,to_char(c.created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_wct_ioe a /*사업비 비목*/ inner join uspt_wct_taxitm b /*사업비 세목*/ on a.wct_ioe_id = b.wct_ioe_id and a.wct_ioe_id in ('ioe-e2630404b87647cfa1d0ed350554eb01','ioe-e2630404b87647cfa1d0ed350554eb02') /*인건비, 운영비*/ inner join uspt_task_taxitm_wct_hist c /*과제세목별사업비*/ on b.wct_taxitm_id = c.wct_taxitm_id and c.cnvn_change_req_id= #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( c.confm_task_taxitm_wct_hist_id is null or c.confm_task_taxitm_wct_hist_id = '') and to_char(c.created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') = #{changeDt}
